items.description: This description is intentionally long so the renderer can prove it keeps the snapshot readable. It includes useful context at the top, then repeats lower-value marketing copy that should not dominate the generated agenda. The first useful link is https://example.com/context and it should remain visible. Repeated details follow. Agenda context. Logistics context. Speaker context. Community context. Parking context.
